request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about us - it's about protecting our families from foreign interference. Did you know that last year alone, foreign actors exploited our reliance on overseas tech to access sensitive data of over 1.2 million Americans? Our allies are stepping up - why aren't we? #SecureOurFuture #StrategicAutonomy
